Appearances:
Attorney, Tina W. Lu of Law Offices of John A. Biard (925-945-4003) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

DEFENDANT DOUGLAS JOHN BURNHAM's MOTION TO CHANGE OF VENUE [CCP SEC. 396b] is GRANTED. No opposition filed. This action is ordered transferred to Alameda County. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
